name: Spicy Cajun Style Buffalo Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Green Dragon or Jalapeno Sau
recipeInstructions:
Chicken wings or small chicken legs; more wings or legs can be added if needed. Kraft BBQ Sauce or K.C. Style sauce. Cajun Spice or Captain Link's Cajun seasoning.
In a Crockpot, add the chicken and BBQ sauce. Stir to combine.
Add all spices: Cayenne Pepper, Salt, Black Pepper, Garlic flakes, Onion flakes, Worcestershire Sauce, Green Dragon/Jalapeno Sau, Tabasco Sauce, and Cajun Spice.
Stir again to ensure everything is well mixed.
Heat on low for 4 hours until the chicken wings are cooked through.
Serve with prepared Cajun Rice.
